title: khaya euryphylla
intro: Khaya euryphylla, also known as the African mahogany tree, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Khaya euryphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
